---
name: Feature request
about: A vim command or behavior you'd like supported
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

**The vim behavior you want**
Describe it as it works in vim (command, motion, text object, etc.).

**How you'd use it in RemNote**
What are you trying to do to your notes?

**Notes**
Some vim features are blocked by the plugin sandbox rather than unimplemented
(Shift-blind keys, no view-scroll API, collapsed-caret reads). See
DEVELOPMENT.md §9 — if your request touches one of those, say so.
